title: SKT's Better Destroy Stage
description: make block destroy stage more visible
body: ![BDS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4ee66896e3bdf3db53198c72a124643819fb151.jpeg) ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 📖⠄Description Make block destroy stage/level more visible by changing the texture to bright color ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 🔢⠄Variant ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dd308ff0d75226055504bca8b9782ffbe20257f_0.webp)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa08f2fc1da46654111f2bc9c74d14088975e90d.jpeg) ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 👋🏼⠄Follow Me ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 🙌🏼⠄Other Project
